utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I really thought you making a good point . I mean you know , until you got cut off .

utterances.speaker: A Female Student
utterances.text: Yeah , what up with that girl Monica ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I do not know ! I did not come with her !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: All right everybody ! Everybody guess what ? I just convinced Paul to give us a test next week !

emotion_cause.span: 4_I just convinced Paul to give us a test next week !
4_I just convinced Paul to give us a test next week !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Come on ! Tests make us all better learners ! Oh yeah ! We should have essay questions ! !
